summary: Full backend + frontend testing for AyurAI. 10/10 pytest backend tests passed covering root, options (12 symptoms/3 lifestyles), rule engine correctness (vata/pitta/kapha scenarios), validation (lifestyle 400, age 422), history sort + no _id leak, delete + 404. Frontend tested via Playwright: page load, header, CTA scroll-to-form, age validation toast, 12 symptom pills (toggle on/off, count updates), lifestyle tile selection, submit -> ResultsCard renders dosha name 'Vata' with herbs (4) + lifestyle advice (5) + percentage bars, About Ayurveda (vata/pitta/kapha cards), History shows newly created record (6 items), delete removes it (6->5), Disclaimer contains 'does not constitute medical advice', Reset clears age and resets to moderate. All critical flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - consider FastAPI lifespan handlers (non-blocking, informational).
analyze endpoint stores datetime as ISO string but response_model converts back to datetime - works fine but slightly awkward; consistent round-trip verified in tests.
CORS uses '*' default which is fine for a prototype but should be restricted in production.
seed_data_creation: Several history records created during backend + frontend tests; one was deleted during frontend flow. Residual TEST records negligible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_ayurai.py run via pytest. Frontend uses data-testid selectors: ayurai-page, dosha-form, input-age, symptom-{id}, lifestyle-{id}, btn-analyze, btn-reset, results-card, dosha-name, herbs-card, lifestyle-card, history-list, history-item-{id}, history-delete-{id}, about-vata/pitta/kapha, disclaimer-section. Note: DoshaForm label text uses CSS uppercase so inner_text returns 'X SELECTED' (caps) - use case-insensitive matching in future tests.
rca of the issue: No production issues. First iteration passed cleanly.
